practice.name: Problem 8 (2016 AIME I)
practice.statement: This is a 2016 AIME I problem focusing on Vieta's formulas and polynomials. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2016_AIME_I_Problems/Problem_8).

practice.name: Problem 7 (2019 AIME II)
practice.statement: This is a 2019 AIME II problem focusing on the Factor Theorem. See the full problem statement on [AoPS](https://artofproblemsolving.com/wiki/index.php/2019_AIME_II_Problems/Problem_7).
